text:
There is an odd sense of displacement in this transition—from a closed, glass-walled meeting room filled with focused conversation to an exhibition space alive with concepts of development and innovation.

Here, the shift from the structured environment behind glass to the vibrant, idea-rich wall before me gives rise to contemplation. I feel slightly disoriented but also inspired, as if moving from a world of practical tasks to a landscape of possibilities. The presence of research and development, juxtaposed with creative displays, stirs a curiosity in me. I am reminded of the importance of both focused action and imaginative exploration in the pursuit of wisdom.
